name: Caribou Marinade i- Juniper
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a non-metal bowl.
2. Use enough marinade for 10 chops or 5 large steaks.
3. Cover and marinate for 2 days or longer, turning daily.
4. Strain the marinade and use it as a BBQ baste or incorporate into gravies and sauces afterwards.
